name: playcraft
description: Automate every Google Play Store publishing task — store listings, ASO, release notes, policy declarations, and screenshot copy. Built by an Android developer who has shipped 20+ apps.

developer_name.title: Developer Name
developer_name.description: Your full name or developer display name (e.g. Your Name)

company.title: Company
company.description: Company / developer label shown on Play Store (e.g. YourCompany)

email.title: Contact Email
email.description: Contact email for Play Console and privacy policy (e.g. you@example.com)

country.title: Country
country.description: Country where you are based (e.g. United States)

default_locale.title: Default Locale
default_locale.description: Default locale for store listings (e.g. en-US)

target_locales.title: Target Locales
target_locales.description: Comma-separated additional locales to support (e.g. fr-FR, de-DE — leave blank to skip)
